Component.Name: PORelEnding
Component.Caption: C(LineReleaseStatic)
Component.MaintainFromSpec: PurchaseOrderBlanketReleases( FILTER(PoNum LIKE ISNULL(FV(POEnding),'%') AND PoLine LIKE ISNULL(FV(POLineEnding),'%')) )

Component.Name: PORelStarting
Component.Caption: C(LineReleaseStatic)
Component.MaintainFromSpec: PurchaseOrderBlanketReleases( FILTER(PoNum LIKE ISNULL(FV(POStarting),'%') AND PoLine LIKE ISNULL(FV(POLineStarting),'%')) )

EventHandler.Name: CreateTempTables
EventHandler.Response: SLPos.CreatePurchaseOrderTTSp( PARMS(VAR V(SessionId), VAR V(SubmitReportCnt), VAR V(SkipStageDelete), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GenerateReport
EventHandler.Description: Values set here are for decreasing the length of the BGTaskParms Call

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLPoParms.GetPoParmsSp( PARMS(RVAR , RVAR , RVAR , RVAR , RVAR , VAR , RVAR V(PurchaseOrderTemplateVar)) )

Variable.Name: ehm1_PopulateGrid0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR pPoType, VAR pPoStat, VAR pPoitemStat, VAR pPostFlag, VAR pPODate, VAR pRoundPlaces, VAR pPrintItemVI, VAR pPrPoTxt, VAR pPrPoBlnNote, VAR pPrPoLineNote, VAR pPrPoBlnDesc, VAR pPrPoLineDesc, VAR pPrPONote, VAR pTransDomCurr, VAR pPrintEuro, VAR pStartPoNum, VAR pEndPoNum, VAR pStartPoLine, VAR pEndPoLine, VAR pStartPoRElease, VAR pEndPoRelease, VAR pStartDueDate, VAR pEndDueDate, VAR pStartvendor, VAR pEndVendor, VAR pStartorderDate, VAR pEndOrderDate, VAR pReviewPrint, VAR pPODateOffs
Variable.Value2: et, VAR pStartDueDateOffset, VAR pEndDueDateOffset, VAR pStartOrderDateOffset, VAR pEndOrderDateOffset, VAR ShowInternal, VAR ShowExternal, VAR pUseProfile)

Variable.Name: fds1_PrimaryMethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(POType), VAR V(POStatus), VAR V(POLineStat), VAR V(PrintItemVI), VAR V(POStarting), VAR V(POEnding), VAR V(POLineStarting), VAR V(POLineEnding), VAR V(PORelStarting), VAR V(PORelEnding), VAR V(DueDateStarting), VAR V(DueDateEnding), VAR V(VendorStarting), VAR V(VendorEnding), VAR V(OrderDateStarting), VAR V(OrderDateEnding), VAR V(0), VAR V(0), VAR V(0), VAR V(0), VAR V(InclBlnWORel))

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: 'From starting point to the number of entries that fit our criteria.
'ProfileExists flag for the first PO is set to No
'The last PO number prior to a change in the ProfileExists flag.
Else ' If the ProfileExists flag for the first PO is yes
'The last PO number prior to a change in po.vend_num
If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("VendNum", linIndex) <> ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("VendNum", linStart) Then Exit For
If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("DerLangCode", linIndex) <> ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("DerLangCode", linStart) Then Exit For
'Clean up variables in case "Preview" is selected next.
'From starting point to the number of entries that fit our criteria.
'ProfileExists flag for the first PO is set to No
'The last PO number prior to a change in the ProfileExists flag.
Else ' If the ProfileExists flag for the first PO is yes
'The last PO number prior to a change in po.vend_num
If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("VendNum", linIndex) <> ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("VendNum", linStart) Then Exit For
If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("DerLangCode", linIndex) <> ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("DerLangCode", linStart) Then Exit For
' This method is triggered by the GenerateBackGroundReport event. That event is called from the
' Background Queue form when the form variable, "NoOfReports" (populated in the SetNoOfReports method),
' is greater than zero. Therefore, this method executes "NoOfReports" times when submitted via the Background
' form (if NoOfReports is zero then GenerateProfile is executed). This method is exactly the same as
' GenerateProfile report except Submit only occurs when the incrementing form variable, "ActualCount" is equal to
' The CollectionRefresh is unnecessary as it is done in SetNoOfReports
'From starting point to the number of entries that fit our criteria.
'ProfileExists flag for the first PO is set to No
'The last PO number prior to a change in the ProfileExists flag.
Else ' If the ProfileExists flag for the first PO is yes
'The last PO number prior to a change in po.vend_num
If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("VendNum", linIndex) <> ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("VendNum", linStart) Then Exit For
If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("DerLangCode", linIndex) <> ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetObjectProperty("DerLangCode", linStart) Then Exit For
